metadata.name: Moon Rhythms Deterministic Astrological Reference
metadata.description: Single source of truth for all deterministic astrological data used by Moon Rhythms. This file is for STRUCTURED LOOKUP — it does NOT go into the RAG vector database. Load it into Supabase as relational tables and reference it from chart calculation and AI prompt assembly.

design_decisions.rulerships: Modern (uses outer planets as rulers): Pluto=Scorpio, Neptune=Pisces, Uranus=Aquarius. Traditional rulers preserved in `traditional_ruler` field.
design_decisions.outer_planets_included: Yes — Uranus, Neptune, Pluto are first-class planets with full data.
design_decisions.asteroids_included: Chiron, Black Moon Lilith, North/South Node included. Ceres, Pallas, Juno, Vesta NOT included for MVP.
design_decisions.valence_language: All references to 'malefic', 'benefic', 'evil', 'fortunate', 'good/bad aspects' are removed from active data. They appear ONLY in `classical_reference` blocks for historical/learning content.
design_decisions.gendered_language: All masculine/feminine sign labels reframed as active/receptive. Sun/father, Moon/mother associations dropped from active data.
design_decisions.tradition: Modern psychological astrology — Western tropical zodiac, Placidus default house system, with Whole Sign as alternate.

planets._schema: Each planet has core identity data, glyph, classification, orbital data, and modern/classical interpretive frames. The `archetype` field is a single-phrase summary for fast AI prompt assembly. The `function` field is the deeper one-sentence description.

sun.name: Sun
sun.function: The core identity, conscious purpose, and capacity to shine

classical_reference.associated_role: father (dropped in modern Moon Rhythms framing)
classical_reference.body_parts: heart, spine, eyes (informational only — not used in AI responses)

moon.name: Moon
moon.function: Instinctive emotional response, what makes you feel safe, your inner private self
moon.moon_rhythms_priority: highest — this is the brand-anchor planet

classical_reference.associated_role: mother (dropped in modern Moon Rhythms framing)

mercury.name: Mercury
mercury.function: Thinking, communication, and how information moves through the mind
mercury.special_property: takes on the character of the planet it most closely aspects

venus.name: Venus
venus.function: What you love, how you love, and what you find beautiful

mars.name: Mars
mars.function: Drive, ambition, anger, and how you assert yourself

jupiter.name: Jupiter
jupiter.function: Growth, optimism, faith, and where you reach beyond yourself

saturn.name: Saturn
saturn.function: Structure, time, mastery, and where you do your slowest growing

uranus.name: Uranus
uranus.function: Originality, sudden change, and the urge to break pattern

neptune.name: Neptune
neptune.function: Imagination, empathy, and the dissolving of boundaries

pluto.name: Pluto
pluto.function: Deep transformation, hidden power, and what gets stripped and reborn
pluto.note_on_planetary_status: Reclassified as 'dwarf planet' by astronomers in 2006. Astrologically, still treated as a primary planetary force.

additional_points._schema: Non-planetary points used in modern interpretation. North Node and South Node are essential. Chiron and Black Moon Lilith are commonly used.

north_node.name: North Node
north_node.function: The qualities you're growing into in this lifetime — unfamiliar but expansive

south_node.name: South Node
south_node.function: The qualities that come easily but represent the past — what to release

chiron.name: Chiron
chiron.function: The deepest wound that becomes the source of healing for self and others
chiron.note: Modern addition. PD interpretive content does not exist for Chiron — must be commissioned.

black_moon_lilith.name: Black Moon Lilith
black_moon_lilith.calculation_method: mean apogee of the Moon's orbit
black_moon_lilith.function: Where you refuse to be tamed, the wild and exiled part of self
black_moon_lilith.note: Modern interpretation, no PD source. Multiple calculation methods exist (Mean, True, Natural) — Moon Rhythms uses Mean Black Moon Lilith by default.

ascendant.name: Ascendant
ascendant.calculation: the degree of the zodiac rising on the eastern horizon at the moment of birth
ascendant.function: How you appear to others, your default style of meeting the world

midheaven.name: Midheaven
midheaven.calculation: the highest point of the chart at the moment of birth
midheaven.function: Where you're heading in public life, what you're known for

descendant.name: Descendant
descendant.calculation: the degree of the zodiac setting on the western horizon at the moment of birth — always opposite the Ascendant
descendant.function: What you seek in partnership, what you project onto others

imum_coeli.name: Imum Coeli
imum_coeli.calculation: the lowest point of the chart at the moment of birth — always opposite the Midheaven
imum_coeli.function: Your private base, your roots, your inner home

part_of_fortune.name: Part of Fortune
part_of_fortune.function: Where things come together with grace — a point of physical wellbeing and lived flow

signs._schema: The 12 zodiac signs in order. Each carries element, modality, polarity, ruler (modern), traditional ruler where different, exalted/detriment/fall planets, and approximate date range. Date ranges are approximate — exact dates shift slightly year to year. Use Swiss Ephemeris for precise sun-sign boundaries.

houses._schema: The 12 houses. Each has a life-domain, a polarity (angular/succedent/cadent which signals weight/intensity), and an associated sign (the 'natural' sign that resonates with that house's themes — Aries with the 1st, Taurus with the 2nd, etc.). Angular houses (1, 4, 7, 10) carry the most weight in chart interpretation.

1.name: First House
1.domain: self, presentation, physical body, first impressions

3.name: Third House
3.domain: communication, siblings, neighbors, short trips, daily learning

4.name: Fourth House
4.domain: home, family of origin, roots, private life, foundation

6.name: Sixth House
6.domain: daily work, routine, health practices, service, craft

8.name: Eighth House
8.domain: intimacy, shared resources, transformation, the taboo

9.name: Ninth House
9.domain: philosophy, higher education, long travel, religion, worldview

11.name: Eleventh House
11.domain: friends, networks, community, future hopes, group efforts

12.name: Twelfth House
12.domain: unconscious, solitude, retreat, dreams, hidden patterns

aspects._schema: Major and minor aspects. Default orbs are starting values; users may eventually configure tighter orbs. Valence is descriptive ('flowing' vs 'frictional') rather than judgmental ('good' vs 'evil').

conjunction.name: Conjunction
conjunction.description: Two planets blend into a single combined energy

sextile.name: Sextile
sextile.description: An open opportunity that must be reached for

square.name: Square
square.description: Internal tension that drives action and growth

opposition.name: Opposition
opposition.description: Tension between two opposing energies that must be integrated

semisextile.name: Semisextile
semisextile.description: Small friction between adjacent signs requiring small adjustment

semisquare.name: Semisquare
semisquare.description: Low-grade irritation, less intense than a square

quintile.name: Quintile
quintile.description: A creative or artistic gift that emerges with practice

sesquiquadrate.name: Sesquiquadrate
sesquiquadrate.description: Indirect tension, often shows up as nagging frustration

biquintile.name: Biquintile
biquintile.description: A unique creative ability, subtler than a quintile

quincunx.name: Quincunx
quincunx.description: Energies that don't fit naturally and require constant adjustment

elements._schema: The four classical elements that group the signs. Used for compatibility analysis and quick chart description.

modalities._schema: The three modalities (qualities) describing HOW a sign expresses its element. Used for understanding pace and approach.

cardinal.name: Cardinal
cardinal.function: starts new things, marks the beginning of each season

fixed.name: Fixed
fixed.function: stabilizes and persists, holds the middle of each season

mutable.name: Mutable
mutable.function: transitions and flexes, ends each season

polarities._schema: Two-way classification of signs by energetic direction. Modern Moon Rhythms uses 'active' and 'receptive' instead of the classical 'masculine/feminine' or 'positive/negative'.

lunar_phases._schema: Eight phases of the lunar cycle, each spanning ~3.7 days. Calculated from the angular distance between Sun and Moon. Critical for Moon Rhythms.

new_moon.name: New Moon
new_moon.function: fresh start, intention-setting, planting seeds in the dark

waxing_crescent.name: Waxing Crescent
waxing_crescent.function: building momentum, initial action on intentions

first_quarter.name: First Quarter
first_quarter.function: first obstacles, decisions that demand commitment

full_moon.name: Full Moon
full_moon.function: culmination, illumination, emotional peak, what was hidden becomes visible

waning_gibbous.name: Waning Gibbous
waning_gibbous.function: sharing what was learned, integration, gratitude

last_quarter.name: Last Quarter
last_quarter.function: release, completion, what no longer fits gets cut

waning_crescent.name: Waning Crescent
waning_crescent.function: rest, surrender, preparation for the next cycle

decans._schema: Each sign divides into three 10-degree decans. Each decan has a sub-ruler (modern Triplicity system used here). The first decan is ruled by the sign's ruler; subsequent decans are ruled by the next planet in the same element. This is used for fine-grained chart analysis.

decan_2.flavor: aries with leo overlay — proud, expressive

decan_3.flavor: aries with sagittarius overlay — adventurous, philosophical

decan_2.flavor: taurus with virgo overlay — methodical, practical

decan_3.flavor: taurus with capricorn overlay — disciplined, structured

decan_2.flavor: gemini with libra overlay — diplomatic, social

decan_3.flavor: gemini with aquarius overlay — original, unconventional

decan_2.flavor: cancer with scorpio overlay — intense, transformative

decan_3.flavor: cancer with pisces overlay — dreamy, compassionate

decan_2.flavor: leo with sagittarius overlay — generous, expansive

decan_3.flavor: leo with aries overlay — bold, action-oriented

decan_2.flavor: virgo with capricorn overlay — disciplined, ambitious

decan_3.flavor: virgo with taurus overlay — sensual, grounded

decan_2.flavor: libra with aquarius overlay — innovative, social-minded

decan_3.flavor: libra with gemini overlay — communicative, intellectual

decan_2.flavor: scorpio with pisces overlay — psychic, mystical

decan_3.flavor: scorpio with cancer overlay — emotionally protective

decan_2.flavor: sagittarius with aries overlay — bold, pioneering

decan_3.flavor: sagittarius with leo overlay — confident, expressive

decan_2.flavor: capricorn with taurus overlay — patient, sensual

decan_3.flavor: capricorn with virgo overlay — methodical, analytical

decan_2.flavor: aquarius with gemini overlay — communicative, ideas-driven

decan_3.flavor: aquarius with libra overlay — diplomatic, socially-attuned

decan_2.flavor: pisces with cancer overlay — emotional, nurturing

decan_3.flavor: pisces with scorpio overlay — deep, transformative

house_systems._schema: Different mathematical methods for dividing the sky into 12 houses. Moon Rhythms defaults to Placidus but offers Whole Sign as alternate. Most users will never see this setting; advanced users will care.

placidus.name: Placidus
placidus.method: time-based; divides the diurnal arc of each ecliptic point

whole_sign.name: Whole Sign
whole_sign.method: each sign occupies one full house starting from the ascending sign
whole_sign.best_for: Hellenistic and traditional astrology, simplicity, polar latitudes
whole_sign.limitation: loses precision in some interpretive contexts

equal_house.name: Equal House
equal_house.method: each house is exactly 30° starting from the ascendant
equal_house.limitation: loses the distinct meaning of the Midheaven as 10th cusp

chart_angles._schema: The four cardinal points of a chart. These are the most important sensitive points in any natal chart. They're distinct from houses but coincide with house cusps in most house systems.

ascendant.name: Ascendant
ascendant.calculation: ecliptic degree rising in the east at moment of birth
ascendant.function: how you appear, your default approach to the world

descendant.name: Descendant
descendant.function: what you seek in partnership, what you project

midheaven.name: Midheaven
midheaven.calculation: highest point of the ecliptic at moment of birth
midheaven.function: public role, vocation, what you're known for

synastry_framework._schema: Deterministic rules for two-chart comparison. Used to bias the AI's interpretation of relationship dynamics. Does NOT contain interpretive content — that lives in commissioned chunks.

default_orbs_for_synastry._note: Synastry orbs are typically tighter than natal aspect orbs.

high_significance_aspects._description: These cross-chart aspects are weighted more heavily in synastry interpretation.
high_significance_aspects.sun_moon_any_aspect: very high — emotional and identity compatibility
high_significance_aspects.ascendant_sun_or_moon: high — felt sense of seeing each other clearly
high_significance_aspects.saturn_personal_planet: high — long-term commitment potential AND restriction patterns

challenging_synastry_patterns._description: Patterns that often produce friction. Not 'bad' — just things to name and work with.

harmonious_synastry_patterns.venus_trine_or_sextile_jupiter: warmth and ease in shared values
harmonious_synastry_patterns.moon_in_partner's_4th_house: feeling at home with each other

moon_sign_compatibility_matrix._schema: Element-based compatibility heuristic for moon signs. This is a SIMPLIFIED model used as a default before deeper synastry analysis. The AI should use this for quick first-pass relationship reads, then layer in nuance.
moon_sign_compatibility_matrix._methodology: Same element = high natural understanding. Compatible element = moderate ease. Challenging element = friction that requires explicit work.

fire_moon_with.earth_moon: challenging — pace mismatch, fire feels constrained
fire_moon_with.air_moon: high — fire feeds air, easy energetic exchange
fire_moon_with.water_moon: challenging — fire's directness can hurt water's sensitivity

earth_moon_with.fire_moon: challenging — fire's pace overwhelms earth's steadiness
earth_moon_with.water_moon: high — water nourishes earth, mutual stability

air_moon_with.air_moon: high — shared mental and social rhythm
air_moon_with.water_moon: challenging — air's detachment can wound water's depth

water_moon_with.fire_moon: challenging — water absorbs fire's heat as overwhelm
water_moon_with.earth_moon: high — earth holds water's depth steadily
water_moon_with.air_moon: challenging — water needs immersion, air needs space

transit_significance._schema: Heuristic for which transits are worth surfacing to users. Not every planetary movement matters — only certain ones produce noticeable life events.

highest_significance.outer_planet_transits_to_personal_planet: saturn, uranus, neptune, pluto crossing your sun, moon, mercury, venus, or mars produces multi-month life themes
highest_significance.outer_planet_to_angles: transits to ASC, MC, DSC, IC mark public/private life shifts
highest_significance.progressed_lunar_phases: the 27.5 year progressed lunation cycle marks deep emotional chapters

low_significance_for_user_alerts._note: Mercury, Venus, Mars, Sun, Moon transits move quickly and most don't merit user notifications. Reserve alerts for outer planets and significant lunations.

classical_reference._note: This block preserves traditional astrological labels and frameworks that are NOT used in modern Moon Rhythms responses. Kept for historical/learning content only. The AI should NOT reference these in user-facing chat unless explicitly asked about astrological history.

planetary_dignities_simple._note: Simplified dignity hierarchy — domicile (rulership) > exaltation > triplicity > term > face. Modern Moon Rhythms uses domicile and exaltation/detriment/fall only.
planetary_dignities_simple.domicile: planet in its own sign — strongest expression
planetary_dignities_simple.exaltation: planet in its sign of exaltation — graceful expression
planetary_dignities_simple.detriment: planet opposite its rulership — challenged expression
planetary_dignities_simple.fall: planet opposite its exaltation — weakest expression

house_body_associations_archived._note: Sepharial's house-to-body-part mapping. NOT used by Moon Rhythms AI. Archived for completeness only.

moon_rhythms_specific._schema: Application-specific deterministic data — settings and conventions that apply specifically to how Moon Rhythms presents data, not general astrological reference.
